calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration Is Set For April 19, 2019
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that there have been several callings of this case, that it has issued an order to appear, an order of suspension and an order to show cause re removal, and that there has been no response. The Court removes Asha Davis as the Executor of the estate and terminates the estate at this time. The Court will issue an order. Status on close of estate and the orders to appear are off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-09-2019 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration Is Set For April 19, 2019
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Jul-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that two orders to appear have been issued which includes the suspension of Ms. Woods. The orders to appear and status on close of estate are continued to July 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. A new Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on July 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to show cause as to why she should not be removed for failure to appear and for failure to file a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration. The Court will consider terminating the estate on its own motion absent her having not shown up.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration Is Set For April 19, 2019
Off Calendar May-14-2019 Continued To Jun-11-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this matter is on for status on close of estate and for failure to appear on April 16th, and that Ms. Davis has chosen to ignore the Court's orders. The Court suspends Asha Davis' powers as the Executor of the estate. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on June 11, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and advising her that she will need to show cause no later than June 5, 2019 as to why she should not be removed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that this hearing date was set when the Executor got appointed and that nothing has been filed. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor to appear on May 14, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of The Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-20-2018 Continued To Mar-06-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court noted that Ms. Davis contacted the Probate Examiner this morning. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is continued to March 6, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Asha Davis in Propria Persona.
Marian Davis (Co-Executor named in the will) in Propria Persona.

Marian Davis stated that she is declining to serve as Executor and that she waives notice. Asha Davis stated that it is still her intention to proceed without an Attorney and that she researches her steps first as to the next steps. The Court still encourages Ms. Davis to seek assistance of an Attorney and informed Ms. Davis that she should look well in advance to know what the steps for administering the estate are. Ms. Davis stated that she agrees, that she is on top this because she is in arbitration and that she will know how to get the letters issued as soon as she leaves Court. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (subject to review of the order). Bond is not required. Status on filing of the inventory and appraisal is set for February 20, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a Petition for Final Distribution or a Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration is set for April 16, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Oct-17-2017 Continued To Oct-24-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-19-2017 Continued To Oct-17-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-15-2017 Continued To Sep-19-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Asha Davis in Propria Persona.

The Court informed Ms. Davis that the matter is still not in a position to move forward and still urges Ms. Davis to seek Counsel. The Court also advised Ms. Davis that she needs to make publication appropriately, file proof of publication and provide a proposed order. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to September 19, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court advised Ms. Davis that she needs to get all of the issues taken care of.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-18-2017 Continued To Aug-15-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Asha Davis in Propria Persona.

The Court strongly urged Ms. Davis to get legal Counsel, explained how complicated probate is, how it is rule driven and how things do not get done if not followed, raised the issue of litigation coming up, spoke of liability to herself as well as to other parties, asked her to explain what the next step would be, and informed Ms. Davis that it can not proceed on the petition as it is presented to the Court and that the Probate Examiner can not assist her in the process. Ms. Davis stated that she believes her case is unique, that she is going to arbitration with Kaiser, that she did not know she had to come to Court to be appointed since she is named the Executor, and that the Decedent does not have any assets and no property. Ms. Davis also stated that distribution will be to the two Sons, that she will not be getting an Attorney and that she will research what step is next. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary is continued to August 15, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court once again strongly urged Ms. Davis to get legal Counsel and stated that until there is a proper petition, the Court can't do anything.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
